name: Top Quark Tagging
description: Binary classification of jets as originating from a top quark decay (signal) or QCD background. The benchmark dataset contains 1.2M jets with 200 jet constituents each, represented as 4-momenta. Standard metric is AUC and background rejection at fixed signal efficiency (e.g. 1/εB at εS = 0.3).

name: Quark/Gluon Discrimination
description: Classify jets as quark-initiated or gluon-initiated using jet constituents. A fundamental QCD measurement with applications in many analyses.

name: 2D Navier-Stokes (Turbulence)
description: Autoregressive prediction of vorticity fields for 2D incompressible Navier-Stokes with periodic boundary conditions and varying viscosity. Evaluated on PDEBench benchmark data.

name: Global Weather Forecasting (Z500)
description: Deterministic medium-range weather forecasting. Primary metric is RMSE of geopotential height at 500 hPa (Z500) at 1-day and 5-day lead times vs. ERA5 reanalysis ground truth.

name: MD17 — Molecular Dynamics
description: Machine learning force field benchmark. Predict energies and forces for small organic molecules (aspirin, ethanol, malonaldehyde, etc.) from ab-initio molecular dynamics trajectories. Evaluated per molecule.
